# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: User File Upload Manager
 * Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents on a membership site.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Author: Custom Developer
 * Text Domain: user-file-upload-manager
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

define('UFUM_PLUGIN_DIR', plugin_dir_path(__FILE__));
define('UFUM_PLUGIN_URL', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__));
define('UFUM_UPLOAD_DIR', 'user-files');

class User_File_Upload_Manager {

    private $allowed_mime_types = array(
        'image/jpeg',
        'image/png',
        'image/gif',
        'image/webp',
        'image/bmp',
        'application/pdf',
        'application/msword',
        'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
        'application/vnd.ms-excel',
        'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
        'application/vnd.ms-powerpoint',
        'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation',
        'text/plain',
        'application/rtf',
        'application/zip',
    );

    private $allowed_extensions = array(
        'jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp',
        'pdf',
        'doc', 'docx',
        'xls', 'xlsx',
        'ppt', 'pptx',
        'txt', 'rtf',
        'zip',
    );

    private $max_file_size = 10485760; // 10MB

    public function __construct() {
        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_admin_menu'));
        add_action('admin_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'admin_enqueue_scripts'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'frontend_enqueue_scripts'));
        add_shortcode('user_file_upload', array($this, 'render_upload_form_shortcode'));
        add_shortcode('user_files_list', array($this, 'render_user_files_list_shortcode'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_ufum_upload_file', array($this, 'handle_ajax_upload'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_ufum_delete_file', array($this, 'handle_ajax_delete'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_ufum_set_profile_picture', array($this, 'handle_set_profile_picture'));
        add_action('show_user_profile', array($this, 'show_user_profile_fields'));
        add_action('edit_user_profile', array($this, 'show_user_profile_fields'));
        add_action('personal_options_update', array($this, 'save_user_profile_fields'));
        add_action('edit_user_profile_update', array($this, 'save_user_profile_fields'));
        add_filter('get_avatar', array($this, 'custom_avatar'), 10, 5);
        add_filter('get_avatar_url', array($this, 'custom_avatar_url'), 10, 3);
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
        register_deactivation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'deactivate'));
    }

    public function init() {
        $this->create_upload_directory();
    }

    public function activate() {
        $this->create_upload_directory();
        $this->create_database_table();
    }

    public function deactivate() {
        // Optionally clean up
    }

    private function create_upload_directory() {
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_files_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/' . UFUM_UPLOAD_DIR;

        if (!file_exists($user_files_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_files_dir);
        }

        $htaccess_file = $user_files_dir . '/.htaccess';
        if (!file_exists($htaccess_file)) {
            $htaccess_content = "Options -Indexes\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "<FilesMatch '\.(php|php5|phtml|cgi|pl|py|sh|bash)$'>\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Order Allow,Deny\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Deny from all\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "</FilesMatch>\n";
            file_put_contents($htaccess_file, $htaccess_content);
        }

        $index_file = $user_files_dir . '/index.php';
        if (!file_exists($index_file)) {
            file_put_contents($index_file, '<?php // Silence is golden.');
        }
    }

    private function create_database_table() {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'ufum_files';
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();

        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $table_name (
            id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            user_id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
            file_name varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            original_name varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            file_path varchar(500) NOT NULL,
            file_url varchar(500) NOT NULL,
            file_type varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            file_size bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            file_category varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'document',
            description text DEFAULT NULL,
            uploaded_at datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            KEY user_id (user_id),
            KEY file_category (file_category)
        ) $charset_collate;";

        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
    }

    public function admin_enqueue_scripts($hook) {
        if (strpos($hook, 'ufum') !== false || $hook === 'profile.php' || $hook === 'user-edit.php') {
            wp_enqueue_style('ufum-admin-style', UFUM_PLUGIN_URL . 'assets/css/admin-style.css', array(), '1.0.0');
            wp_enqueue_script('ufum-admin-script', UFUM_PLUGIN_URL . 'assets/js/admin-script.js', array('jquery'), '1.0.0', true);
            wp_localize_script('ufum-admin-script', 'ufum_ajax', array(
                'ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
                'nonce' => wp_create_nonce('ufum_nonce'),
            ));
        }
    }

    public function frontend_enqueue_scripts() {
        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_enqueue_style('ufum-frontend-style', UFUM_PLUGIN_URL . 'assets/css/frontend-style.css', array(), '1.0.0');
            wp_enqueue_script('ufum-frontend-script', UFUM_PLUGIN_URL . 'assets/js/frontend-script.js', array('jquery'), '1.0.0', true);
            wp_localize_script('ufum-frontend-script', 'ufum_ajax', array(
                'ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
                'nonce' => wp_create_nonce('ufum_nonce'),
            ));
        }
    }

    public function add_admin_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            __('User Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            __('User Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            'manage_options',
            'ufum-dashboard',
            array($this, 'render_admin_dashboard'),
            'dashicons-media-document',
            30
        );

        add_submenu_page(
            'ufum-dashboard',
            __('All Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            __('All Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            'manage_options',
            'ufum-dashboard',
            array($this, 'render_admin_dashboard')
        );

        add_submenu_page(
            'ufum-dashboard',
            __('Settings', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            __('Settings', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            'manage_options',
            'ufum-settings',
            array($this, 'render_settings_page')
        );
    }

    private function get_user_upload_dir($user_id) {
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/' . UFUM_UPLOAD_DIR . '/user-' . intval($user_id);

        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
            file_put_contents($user_dir . '/index.php', '<?php // Silence is golden.');
        }

        return $user_dir;
    }

    private function get_user_upload_url($user_id) {
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        return $upload_dir['baseurl'] . '/' . UFUM_UPLOAD_DIR . '/user-' . intval($user_id);
    }

    private function validate_file($file) {
        $errors = array();

        if ($file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            switch ($file['error']) {
                case UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE:
                case UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE:
                    $errors[] = __('File exceeds the maximum upload size.', 'user-file-upload-manager');
                    break;
                case UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL:
                    $errors[] = __('File was only partially uploaded.', 'user-file-upload-manager');
                    break;
                case UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE:
                    $errors[] = __('No file was uploaded.', 'user-file-upload-manager');
                    break;
                default:
                    $errors[] = __('An unknown upload error occurred.', 'user-file-upload-manager');
                    break;
            }
            return $errors;
        }

        if ($file['size'] > $this->max_file_size) {
            $errors[] = sprintf(__('File size exceeds the maximum limit of %s MB.', 'user-file-upload-manager'), $this->max_file_size / 1048576);
        }

        $file_extension = strtolower(pathinfo($file['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        if (!in_array($file_extension, $this->allowed_extensions)) {
            $errors[] = sprintf(__('File type .%s is not allowed.', 'user-file-upload-manager'), $file_extension);
        }

        $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $detected_mime = $finfo->file($file['tmp_name']);

        if (!in_array($detected_mime, $this->allowed_mime_types)) {
            // Allow for some mime type detection variations
            $mime_check_passed = false;
            // Office documents sometimes detect as application/octet-stream or application/zip
            if (in_array($file_extension, array('docx', 'xlsx', 'pptx')) && in_array($detected_mime, array('application/octet-stream', 'application/zip'))) {
                $mime_check_passed = true;
            }
            if (in_array($file_extension, array('doc', 'xls', 'ppt')) && $detected_mime === 'application/octet-stream') {
                $mime_check_passed = true;
            }
            if (!$mime_check_passed) {
                $errors[] = __('File MIME type is not allowed.', 'user-file-upload-manager');
            }
        }

        // Check for PHP content in uploaded files
        $file_content = file_get_contents($file['tmp_name'], false, null, 0, 1024);
        if ($file_content !== false && (stripos($file_content, '<?php') !== false || stripos($file_content, '<script') !== false)) {
            $errors[] = __('File contains potentially malicious content.', 'user-file-upload-manager');
        }

        return $errors;
    }

    private function generate_unique_filename($original_name, $user_id) {
        $extension = strtolower(pathinfo($original_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        $name = sanitize_file_name(pathinfo($original_name, PATHINFO_FILENAME));
        $name = substr($name, 0, 100);
        $unique = wp_generate_password(8, false);
        $timestamp = time();

        return $name . '-' . $timestamp . '-' . $unique . '.' . $extension;
    }

    public function handle_upload($file, $user_id, $category = 'document', $description = '') {
        $errors = $this->validate_file($file);

        if (!empty($errors)) {
            return new WP_Error('upload_error', implode(' ', $errors));
        }

        $user_dir = $this->get_user_upload_dir($user_id);
        $user_url = $this->get_user_upload_url($user_id);
        $new_filename = $this->generate_unique_filename($file['name'], $user_id);
        $destination = $user_dir . '/' . $new_filename;

        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            return new WP_Error('move_error', __('Failed to move uploaded file.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        // Set proper file permissions
        chmod($destination, 0644);

        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'ufum_files';

        $file_data = array(
            'user_id' => $user_id,
            'file_name' => $new_filename,
            'original_name' => sanitize_file_name($file['name']),
            'file_path' => $destination,
            'file_url' => $user_url . '/' . $new_filename,
            'file_type' => $file['type'],
            'file_size' => $file['size'],
            'file_category' => sanitize_text_field($category),
            'description' => sanitize_textarea_field($description),
            'uploaded_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        );

        $result = $wpdb->insert($table_name, $file_data);

        if ($result === false) {
            unlink($destination);
            return new WP_Error('db_error', __('Failed to save file record to database.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        $file_data['id'] = $wpdb->insert_id;

        do_action('ufum_file_uploaded', $file_data, $user_id);

        return $file_data;
    }

    public function handle_ajax_upload() {
        check_ajax_referer('ufum_nonce', 'nonce');

        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('You must be logged in to upload files.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        if (empty($_FILES['ufum_file'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('No file was provided.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $category = isset($_POST['file_category']) ? sanitize_text_field($_POST['file_category']) : 'document';
        $description = isset($_POST['file_description']) ? sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['file_description']) : '';

        // Check if admin is uploading for a specific user
        if (current_user_can('manage_options') && !empty($_POST['target_user_id'])) {
            $user_id = intval($_POST['target_user_id']);
        }

        $result = $this->handle_upload($_FILES['ufum_file'], $user_id, $category, $description);

        if (is_wp_error($result)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $result->get_error_message()));
        }

        // If it's a profile picture category, set it as the user's profile picture
        if ($category === 'profile_picture') {
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_id', $result['id']);
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url', $result['file_url']);
        }

        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'message' => __('File uploaded successfully.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            'file' => $result,
        ));
    }

    public function handle_ajax_delete() {
        check_ajax_referer('ufum_nonce', 'nonce');

        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('You must be logged in.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        $file_id = isset($_POST['file_id']) ? intval($_POST['file_id']) : 0;

        if (!$file_id) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Invalid file ID.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'ufum_files';
        $file = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE id = %d", $file_id));

        if (!$file) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('File not found.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();
        if ($file->user_id != $current_user_id && !current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('You do not have permission to delete this file.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        // Delete physical file
        if (file_exists($file->file_path)) {
            unlink($file->file_path);
        }

        // Delete database record
        $wpdb->delete($table_name, array('id' => $file_id));

        // If this was the user's profile picture, remove the meta
        $profile_pic_id = get_user_meta($file->user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_id', true);
        if ($profile_pic_id == $file_id) {
            delete_user_meta($file->user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_id');
            delete_user_meta($file->user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url');
        }

        do_action('ufum_file_deleted', $file);

        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => __('File deleted successfully.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
    }

    public function handle_set_profile_picture() {
        check_ajax_referer('ufum_nonce', 'nonce');

        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('You must be logged in.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        $file_id = isset($_POST['file_id']) ? intval($_POST['file_id']) : 0;

        if (!$file_id) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Invalid file ID.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'ufum_files';
        $file = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE id = %d", $file_id));

        if (!$file) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('File not found.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();
        if ($file->user_id != $current_user_id && !current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('You do not have permission.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        // Check if it's an image
        if (strpos($file->file_type, 'image/') !== 0) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Only image files can be set as profile pictures.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        update_user_meta($file->user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_id', $file_id);
        update_user_meta($file->user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url', $file->file_url);

        // Update file category
        $wpdb->update($table_name, array('file_category' => 'profile_picture'), array('id' => $file_id));

        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'message' => __('Profile picture updated.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            'url' => $file->file_url,
        ));
    }

    public function get_user_files($user_id, $category = '', $limit = -1, $offset = 0) {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'ufum_files';

        $query = "SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE user_id = %d";
        $params = array($user_id);

        if (!empty($category)) {
            $query .= " AND file_category = %s";
            $params[] = $category;
        }

        $query .= " ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC";

        if ($limit > 0) {
            $query .= " LIMIT %d OFFSET %d";
            $params[] = $limit;
            $params[] = $offset;
        }

        return $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare($query, $params));
    }

    public function get_all_files($limit = 50, $offset = 0, $search = '', $category = '') {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'ufum_files';

        $query = "SELECT f.*, u.display_name as user_display_name, u.user_email 
                  FROM $table_name f 
                  LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->users} u ON f.user_id = u.ID 
                  WHERE 1=1";
        $params = array();

        if (!empty($search)) {
            $query .= " AND (f.original_name LIKE %s OR u.display_name LIKE %s OR u.user_email LIKE %s)";
            $search_like = '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($search) . '%';
            $params[] = $search_like;
            $params[] = $search_like;
            $params[] = $search_like;
        }

        if (!empty($category)) {
            $query .= " AND f.file_category = %s";
            $params[] = $category;
        }

        $query .= " ORDER BY f.uploaded_at DESC LIMIT %d OFFSET %d";
        $params[] = $limit;
        $params[] = $offset;

        if (!empty($params)) {
            return $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare($query, $params));
        }

        return $wpdb->get_results($query);
    }

    public function get_total_files_count($search = '', $category = '') {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'ufum_files';

        $query = "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $table_name f 
                  LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->users} u ON f.user_id = u.ID 
                  WHERE 1=1";
        $params = array();

        if (!empty($search)) {
            $query .= " AND (f.original_name LIKE %s OR u.display_name LIKE %s OR u.user_email LIKE %s)";
            $search_like = '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($search) . '%';
            $params[] = $search_like;
            $params[] = $search_like;
            $params[] = $search_like;
        }

        if (!empty($category)) {
            $query .= " AND f.file_category = %s";
            $params[] = $category;
        }

        if (!empty($params)) {
            return $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare($query, $params));
        }

        return $wpdb->get_var($query);
    }

    // Custom avatar filter
    public function custom_avatar($avatar, $id_or_email, $size, $default, $alt) {
        $user_id = 0;

        if (is_numeric($id_or_email)) {
            $user_id = intval($id_or_email);
        } elseif (is_string($id_or_email)) {
            $user = get_user_by('email', $id_or_email);
            if ($user) {
                $user_id = $user->ID;
            }
        } elseif ($id_or_email instanceof WP_User) {
            $user_id = $id_or_email->ID;
        } elseif ($id_or_email instanceof WP_Comment) {
            $user_id = $id_or_email->user_id;
        }

        if ($user_id) {
            $custom_avatar_url = get_user_meta($user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url', true);
            if (!empty($custom_avatar_url)) {
                $avatar = sprintf(
                    '<img alt="%s" src="%s" class="avatar avatar-%d photo ufum-avatar" height="%d" width="%d" loading="lazy" />',
                    esc_attr($alt),
                    esc_url($custom_avatar_url),
                    intval($size),
                    intval($size),
                    intval($size)
                );
            }
        }

        return $avatar;
    }

    public function custom_avatar_url($url, $id_or_email, $args) {
        $user_id = 0;

        if (is_numeric($id_or_email)) {
            $user_id = intval($id_or_email);
        } elseif (is_string($id_or_email)) {
            $user = get_user_by('email', $id_or_email);
            if ($user) {
                $user_id = $user->ID;
            }
        } elseif ($id_or_email instanceof WP_User) {
            $user_id = $id_or_email->ID;
        }

        if ($user_id) {
            $custom_avatar_url = get_user_meta($user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url', true);
            if (!empty($custom_avatar_url)) {
                return $custom_avatar_url;
            }
        }

        return $url;
    }

    // User profile fields in admin
    public function show_user_profile_fields($user) {
        $profile_pic_url = get_user_meta($user->ID, 'ufum_profile_picture_url', true);
        $files = $this->get_user_files($user->ID);
        ?>
        <h2><?php _e('Profile Picture & Documents', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></h2>
        <table class="form-table">
            <tr>
                <th><label><?php _e('Profile Picture', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></label></th>
                <td>
                    <?php if (!empty($profile_pic_url)) : ?>
                        <img src="<?php echo esc_url($profile_pic_url); ?>" style="max-width: 150px; max-height: 150px; border-radius: 50%; display: block; margin-bottom: 10px;" />
                    <?php endif; ?>
                    <div class="ufum-admin-upload-form">
                        <input type="file" name="ufum_profile_picture" id="ufum_profile_picture" accept="image/*" />
                        <p class="description"><?php _e('Upload a new profile picture (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP).', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                    </div>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <th><label><?php _e('Uploaded Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></label></th>
                <td>
                    <?php if (!empty($files)) : ?>
                        <table class="widefat striped" style="max-width: 800px;">
                            <thead>
                                <tr>
                                    <th><?php _e('File', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                                    <th><?php _e('Category', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                                    <th><?php _e('Size', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                                    <th><?php _e('Date', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <?php foreach ($files as $file) : ?>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><a href="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" target="_blank"><?php echo esc_html($file->original_name); ?></a></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $file->file_category))); ?></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html(size_format($file->file_size)); ?></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($file->uploaded_at))); ?></td>
                                    </tr>
                                <?php endforeach; ?>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    <?php else : ?>
                        <p><?php _e('No files uploaded yet.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </td>
            </tr>
        </table>
        <?php
    }

    public function save_user_profile_fields($user_id) {
        if (!current_user_can('edit_user', $user_id)) {
            return;
        }

        if (!empty($_FILES['ufum_profile_picture']['name'])) {
            $result = $this->handle_upload($_FILES['ufum_profile_picture'], $user_id, 'profile_picture', 'Profile Picture');
            if (!is_wp_error($result)) {
                update_user_meta($user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_id', $result['id']);
                update_user_meta($user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url', $result['file_url']);
            }
        }
    }

    private function get_file_icon_class($file_type) {
        if (strpos($file_type, 'image/') === 0) {
            return 'ufum-icon-image';
        } elseif ($file_type === 'application/pdf') {
            return 'ufum-icon-pdf';
        } elseif (in_array($file_type, array('application/msword', 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document'))) {
            return 'ufum-icon-doc';
        } elseif (in_array($file_type, array('application/vnd.ms-excel', 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'))) {
            return 'ufum-icon-xls';
        } elseif (in_array($file_type, array('application/vnd.ms-powerpoint', 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation'))) {
            return 'ufum-icon-ppt';
        } elseif ($file_type === 'text/plain') {
            return 'ufum-icon-txt';
        } else {
            return 'ufum-icon-file';
        }
    }

    // Shortcode: Upload Form
    public function render_upload_form_shortcode($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="ufum-notice ufum-notice-error">' . __('Please log in to upload files.', 'user-file-upload-manager') . '</div>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts(array(
            'category' => '',
            'show_categories' => 'true',
            'allowed_categories' => 'profile_picture,document,id_document,certificate,other',
            'title' => __('Upload File', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            'show_description' => 'true',
        ), $atts, 'user_file_upload');

        $categories = array_map('trim', explode(',', $atts['allowed_categories']));

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="ufum-upload-container">
            <h3 class="ufum-title"><?php echo esc_html($atts['title']); ?></h3>
            <div class="ufum-upload-messages"></div>
            <form class="ufum-upload-form" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="ufum_upload_file" />
                <input type="hidden" name="nonce" value="<?php echo wp_create_nonce('ufum_nonce'); ?>" />

                <div class="ufum-form-group">
                    <label for="ufum_file"><?php _e('Select File', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?> <span class="required">*</span></label>
                    <div class="ufum-dropzone" id="ufum-dropzone">
                        <div class="ufum-dropzone-content">
                            <span class="dashicons dashicons-cloud-upload ufum-upload-icon"></span>
                            <p><?php _e('Drag & drop your file here or click to browse', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                            <p class="ufum-file-info"><?php printf(__('Max file size: %s MB. Allowed: Images, PDFs, Documents', 'user-file-upload-manager'), $this->max_file_size / 1048576); ?></p>
                        </div>
                        <input type="file" name="ufum_file" id="ufum_file" class="ufum-file-input" required />
                    </div>
                    <div class="ufum-file-preview" style="display: none;">
                        <span class="ufum-preview-name"></span>
                        <span class="ufum-preview-size"></span>
                        <button type="button" class="ufum-remove-file">&times;</button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <?php if ($atts['show_categories'] === 'true' && empty($atts['category'])) : ?>
                    <div class="ufum-form-group">
                        <label for="ufum_category"><?php _e('Category', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></label>
                        <select name="file_category" id="ufum_category" class="ufum-select">
                            <?php foreach ($categories as $cat) : ?>
                                <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($cat); ?>"><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $cat))); ?></option>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                <?php else : ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="file_category" value="<?php echo esc_attr($atts['category']); ?>" />
                <?php endif; ?>

                <?php if ($atts['show_description'] === 'true') : ?>
                    <div class="ufum-form-group">
                        <label for="ufum_description"><?php _e('Description (optional)', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></label>
                        <textarea name="file_description" id="ufum_description" class="ufum-textarea" rows="3" placeholder="<?php esc_attr_e('Add a description for this file...', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>"></textarea>
                    </div>
                <?php endif; ?>

                <div class="ufum-form-group">
                    <button type="submit" class="ufum-submit-btn">
                        <span class="ufum-btn-text"><?php _e('Upload File', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></span>
                        <span class="ufum-btn-loading" style="display: none;">
                            <span class="ufum-spinner"></span> <?php _e('Uploading...', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>
                        </span>
                    </button>
                </div>

                <div class="ufum-progress-bar" style="display: none;">
                    <div class="ufum-progress-fill"></div>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    // Shortcode: Files List
    public function render_user_files_list_shortcode($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="ufum-notice ufum-notice-error">' . __('Please log in to view your files.', 'user-file-upload-manager') . '</div>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts(array(
            'category' => '',
            'limit' => 20,
            'show_delete' => 'true',
            'show_set_avatar' => 'true',
            'title' => __('My Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
        ), $atts, 'user_files_list');

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $files = $this->get_user_files($user_id, $atts['category'], intval($atts['limit']));

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="ufum-files-container">
            <h3 class="ufum-title"><?php echo esc_html($atts['title']); ?></h3>
            <div class="ufum-files-messages"></div>

            <?php if (empty($files)) : ?>
                <div class="ufum-no-files">
                    <span class="dashicons dashicons-media-document ufum-no-files-icon"></span>
                    <p><?php _e('No files uploaded yet.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                </div>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="ufum-files-grid">
                    <?php foreach ($files as $file) : ?>
                        <div class="ufum-file-card" data-file-id="<?php echo esc_attr($file->id); ?>">
                            <div class="ufum-file-thumbnail">
                                <?php if (strpos($file->file_type, 'image/') === 0) : ?>
                                    <img src="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" alt="<?php echo esc_attr($file->original_name); ?>" />
                                <?php else : ?>
                                    <div class="ufum-file-icon <?php echo esc_attr($this->get_file_icon_class($file->file_type)); ?>">
                                        <span class="ufum-ext"><?php echo esc_html(strtoupper(pathinfo($file->original_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION))); ?></span>
                                    </div>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </div>
                            <div class="ufum-file-info">
                                <h4 class="ufum-file-name" title="<?php echo esc_attr($file->original_name); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($file->original_name); ?></h4>
                                <span class="ufum-file-meta">
                                    <?php echo esc_html(size_format($file->file_size)); ?> &bull;
                                    <?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $file->file_category))); ?>
                                </span>
                                <span class="ufum-file-date"><?php echo esc_html(human_time_diff(strtotime($file->uploaded_at), current_time('timestamp')) . ' ' . __('ago', 'user-file-upload-manager')); ?></span>
                                <?php if (!empty($file->description)) : ?>
                                    <p class="ufum-file-description"><?php echo esc_html($file->description); ?></p>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </div>
                            <div class="ufum-file-actions">
                                <a href="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" class="ufum-btn ufum-btn-view" target="_blank" title="<?php esc_attr_e('View/Download', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>">
                                    <span class="dashicons dashicons-download"></span>
                                </a>
                                <?php if ($atts['show_set_avatar'] === 'true' && strpos($file->file_type, 'image/') === 0) : ?>
                                    <button type="button" class="ufum-btn ufum-btn-avatar" data-file-id="<?php echo esc_attr($file->id); ?>" title="<?php esc_attr_e('Set as Profile Picture', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>">
                                        <span class="dashicons dashicons-admin-users"></span>
                                    </button>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                                <?php if ($atts['show_delete'] === 'true') : ?>
                                    <button type="button" class="ufum-btn ufum-btn-delete" data-file-id="<?php echo esc_attr($file->id); ?>" title="<?php esc_attr_e('Delete', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>">
                                        <span class="dashicons dashicons-trash"></span>
                                    </button>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    // Admin Dashboard
    public function render_admin_dashboard() {
        $per_page = 20;
        $current_page = isset($_GET['paged']) ? max(1, intval($_GET['paged'])) : 1;
        $offset = ($current_page - 1) * $per_page;
        $search = isset($_GET['s']) ? sanitize_text_field($_GET['s']) : '';
        $category = isset($_GET['category']) ? sanitize_text_field($_GET['category']) : '';

        $files = $this->get_all_files($per_page, $offset, $search, $category);
        $total_files = $this->get_total_files_count($search, $category);
        $total_pages = ceil($total_files / $per_page);
        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1><?php _e('User Files Manager', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></h1>

            <div class="ufum-admin-stats">
                <div class="ufum-stat-box">
                    <h3><?php echo intval($total_files); ?></h3>
                    <p><?php _e('Total Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ufum-admin-filters">
                <form method="get" action="">
                    <input type="hidden" name="page" value="ufum-dashboard" />
                    <input type="search" name="s" value="<?php echo esc_attr($search); ?>" placeholder="<?php esc_attr_e('Search files...', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>" />
                    <select name="category">
                        <option value=""><?php _e('All Categories', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                        <option value="profile_picture" <?php selected($category, 'profile_picture'); ?>><?php _e('Profile Picture', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                        <option value="document" <?php selected($category, 'document'); ?>><?php _e('Document', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                        <option value="id_document" <?php selected($category, 'id_document'); ?>><?php _e('ID Document', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                        <option value="certificate" <?php selected($category, 'certificate'); ?>><?php _e('Certificate', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                        <option value="other" <?php selected($category, 'other'); ?>><?php _e('Other', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                    </select>
                    <button type="submit" class="button"><?php _e('Filter', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></button>
                </form>
            </div>

            <table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th style="width: 5%;"><?php _e('ID', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <th style="width: 10%;"><?php _e('Preview', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <th style="width: 20%;"><?php _e('File Name', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <th style="width: 15%;"><?php _e('User', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <th style="width: 10%;"><?php _e('Category', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <th style="width: 10%;"><?php _e('Type', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <th style="width: 8%;"><?php _e('Size', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <th style="width: 12%;"><?php _e('Date', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <th style="width: 10%;"><?php _e('Actions', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php if (empty($files)) : ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td colspan="9"><?php _e('No files found.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php else : ?>
                        <?php foreach ($files as $file) : ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($file->id); ?></td>
                                <td>
                                    <?php if (strpos($file->file_type, 'image/') === 0) : ?>
                                        <img src="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" style="max-width: 50px; max-height: 50px;" />
                                    <?php else : ?>
                                        <span class="dashicons dashicons-media-document" style="font-size: 30px; width: 30px; height: 30px;"></span>
                                    <?php endif; ?>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" target="_blank"><?php echo esc_html($file->original_name); ?></a>
                                    <?php if (!empty($file->description)) : ?>
                                        <br /><small><?php echo esc_html(wp_trim_words($file->description, 10)); ?></small>
                                    <?php endif; ?>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <?php echo esc_html($file->user_display_name); ?><br />
                                    <small><?php echo esc_html($file->user_email); ?></small>
                                </td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $file->file_category))); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(strtoupper(pathinfo($file->original_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION))); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(size_format($file->file_size)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format') . ' ' . get_option('time_format'), strtotime($file->uploaded_at))); ?></td>
                                <td>
                                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" class="button button-small" target="_blank"><?php _e('View', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></a>
                                    <button type="button" class="button button-small ufum-admin-delete-btn" data-file-id="<?php echo esc_attr($file->id); ?>"><?php _e('Delete', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></button>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>

            <?php if ($total_pages > 1) : ?>
                <div class="tablenav bottom">
                    <div class="tablenav-pages">
                        <?php
                        echo paginate_links(array(
                            'base' => add_query_arg('paged', '%#%'),
                            'format' => '',
                            'prev_text' => '&laquo;',
                            'next_text' => '&raquo;',
                            'total' => $total_pages,
                            'current' => $current_page,
                        ));
                        ?>
                    </div>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
    }

    public function render_settings_page() {
        if (isset($_POST['ufum_save_settings']) && check_admin_referer('ufum_settings_nonce')) {
            $max_size = isset($_POST['ufum_max_file_size']) ? intval($_POST['ufum_max_file_size']) : 10;
            update_option('ufum_max_file_size', $max_size);

            $allowed_types = isset($_POST['ufum_allowed_types']) ? sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['ufum_allowed_types']) : '';
            update_option('ufum_allowed_types', $allowed_types);

            echo '<div class="notice notice-success"><p>' . __('Settings saved.', 'user-file-upload-manager') . '</p></div>';
        }

        $max_size = get_option('ufum_max_file_size', 10);
        $allowed_types = get_option('ufum_allowed_types', implode(', ', $this->allowed_extensions));
        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1><?php _e('User File Upload Settings', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></h1>

            <form method="post" action="">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('ufum_settings_nonce'); ?>

                <table class="form-table">
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row"><label for="ufum_max_file_size"><?php _e('Maximum File Size (MB)', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></label></th>
                        <td>
                            <input type="number" name="ufum_max_file_size" id="ufum_max_file_size" value="<?php echo esc_attr($max_size); ?>" min="1" max="100" class="small-text" />
                            <p class="description"><?php _e('Maximum file size in megabytes. Server limit:', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?> <?php echo esc_html(ini_get('upload_max_filesize')); ?></p>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row"><label for="ufum_allowed_types"><?php _e('Allowed File Extensions', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></label></th>
                        <td>
                            <textarea name="ufum_allowed_types" id="ufum_allowed_types" rows="3" cols="50" class="large-text"><?php echo esc_textarea($allowed_types); ?></textarea>
                            <p class="description"><?php _e('Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row"><?php _e('Shortcodes', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <td>
                            <p><code>[user_file_upload]</code> - <?php _e('Displays the file upload form.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                            <p><code>[user_file_upload category="profile_picture"]</code> - <?php _e('Upload form for a specific category.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                            <p><code>[user_files_list]</code> - <?php _e('Displays the user\'s uploaded files.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                            <p><code>[user_files_list category="document" limit="10"]</code> - <?php _e('Files list with filters.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                </table>

                <p class="submit">
                    <input type="submit" name="ufum_save_settings" class="button-primary" value="<?php esc_attr_e('Save Settings', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>" />
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
    }
}

// Initialize the plugin
$ufum_plugin = new User_File_Upload_Manager();

// Create assets directory and files on plugin load
function ufum_create_assets() {
    $plugin_dir = plugin_dir_path(__FILE__);

    // Create directories
    $dirs = array('assets', 'assets/css', 'assets/js');
    foreach ($dirs as $dir) {
        $full_path = $plugin_dir . $dir;
        if (!file_exists($full_path)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($full_path);
        }
    }

    // Create frontend CSS
    $frontend_css = $plugin_dir . 'assets/css/frontend-style.css';
    if (!file_exists($frontend_css)) {
        $css_content = '
/* User File Upload Manager - Frontend Styles */
.ufum-upload-container,
.ufum-files-container {
    max-width: 800px;
    margin: 20px 0;
    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen-Sans, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif;
}

.ufum-title {
    font-size: 1.4em;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    color: #1d2327;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #2271b1;
    padding-bottom: 10px;
}

.ufum-form-group {
    margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.ufum-form-group label {
    display: block;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    color: #1d2327;
}

.ufum-form-group label .required {
    color: #d63638;
}

.ufum-dropzone {
    border: 2px dashed #c3c4c7;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 40px 20px;
    text-align: center;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    background: #f9f9f9;
    position: relative;
}

.ufum-dropzone:hover,
.ufum-dropzone.dragover {
    border-color: #2271b1;
    background: #f0f6fc;
}

.ufum-dropzone .ufum-upload-icon {
    font-size: 48px;
    color: #2271b1;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
}

.ufum-dropzone p {
    margin: 5px 0;
    color: #646970;
}

.ufum-file-info {
    font-size: 0.85em;
    color: #a7aaad !important;
}

.ufum-file-input {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    opacity: 0;
    cursor: pointer;
}

.ufum-file-preview {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 10px 15px;
    background: #f0f6fc;
    border: 1px solid #2271b1;
    border-radius: 4px;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.ufum-preview-name {
    flex: 1;
    font-weight: 600;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.ufum-preview-size {
    color: #646970;
    margin: 0 15px;
    font-size: 0.9em;
}

.ufum-remove-file {
    background: #d63638;
    color: white;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 50%;
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
    font-size: 16px;
    cursor: pointer;
    line-height: 24px;
    padding: 0;
}

.ufum-select,
.ufum-textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 8px 12px;
    border: 1px solid #c3c4c7;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 14px;
}

.ufum-textarea {
    resize: vertical;
}

.ufum-submit-btn {
    background: #2271b1;
    color: white;
    border: none;
    padding: 12px 30px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.3s ease;
}

.ufum-submit-btn:hover {
    background: #135e96;
}

.ufum-submit-btn:disabled {
    background: #a7aaad;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.ufum-spinner {
    display: inline-block;
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    border-radius: 50%;
    border-top-color: white;
    animation: ufum-spin 0.6s linear infinite;
    vertical-align: middle;
}

@keyframes ufum-spin {
    to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

.ufum-progress-bar {
    height: 4px;
    background: #e0e0e0;
    border-radius: 2px;
    margin-top: 15px;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.ufum-progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: #2271b1;
    width: 0;
    transition: width 0.3s ease;
    border-radius: 2px;
}

/* Files Grid */
.ufum-files-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
}

.ufum-file-card {
    border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    background: white;
}

.ufum-file-card:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.ufum-file-thumbnail {
    height: 150px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: #f6f7f7;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.ufum-file-thumbnail img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
}

.ufum-file-icon {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px;
}

.ufum-file-icon .ufum-ext {
    display: block;
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #646970;
}

.ufum-icon-pdf .ufum-ext { color: #d63638; }
.ufum-icon-doc .ufum-ext { color: #2271b1; }
.ufum-icon-xls .ufum-ext { color: #00a32a; }
.ufum-icon-ppt .ufum-ext { color: #dba617; }
.ufum-icon-txt .ufum-ext { color: #646970; }

.ufum-file-card .ufum-file-info {
    padding: 15px;
}

.ufum-file-name {
    margin: 0 0 5px 0;
    font-size: 14px;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.ufum-file-meta {
    display: block;
    font-
